nodes.context: Kenyan criminal organization, Luo tribe, active in Nairobi slums, main opponents are Mungiki.
Kenyan criminal organization of the Kikuyu tribe, main opponents of Taliban.
Original Luo grouping that splintered into Taliban and other factions, emerged early 1990s.
Kalenjin tribe gang allied with Taliban.

Group that supported Taliban in 2006 conflict.

edges.evidence_quote: Their main opponents are the Mungiki of the Kikuyu tribe.
edges.context: Taliban and Mungiki are main opponents.

edges.evidence_quote: The Taliban emerged as an offshoot of the Baghdad Boys
edges.context: Taliban is a splinter group of Baghdad Boys.

edges.evidence_quote: The Taliban form alliances with gangs ( People's Liberation Army and the Group of 41 ) of the Kalenjin tribe
